sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَتِ الْحُكُومَةُ عَنْ مَشْرُوعٍ جَدِيدٍ لِحِمَايَةِ الْبِيئَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada je najavila novi projekat za zaštitu okoliša.
sentences.translationEn: The government announced a new project to protect the environment.

sentences.arabic: سَيَقُومُ الْمُتَطَوِّعُونَ بِزِرَاعَةِ آلَافِ الْأَشْجَارِ فِي الْغَابَاتِ الْقَرِيبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Volonteri će zasaditi hiljade stabala u obližnjim šumama.
sentences.translationEn: Volunteers will plant thousands of trees in nearby forests.

sentences.arabic: هَدَفُ هَذَا الْمَشْرُوعِ هُوَ تَقْلِيلُ التَّلَوُّثِ وَتَحْسِينُ جَوْدَةِ الْهَوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Cilj ovog projekta je smanjenje zagađenja i poboljšanje kvaliteta zraka.
sentences.translationEn: The goal of this project is to reduce pollution and improve air quality.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا سَتُنَظِّمُ الْمَدَارِسُ حَمَلَاتٍ لِتَوْعِيَةِ الطُّلَّابِ بِأَهَمِّيَّةِ الطَّبِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Također, škole će organizovati kampanje kako bi podigle svijest učenika o važnosti prirode.
sentences.translationEn: Schools will also organize campaigns to raise students' awareness of the importance of nature.

sentences.arabic: يَأْمُلُ الْجَمِيعُ أَنْ يُسَاعِدَ هَذَا الْعَمَلُ فِي مُوَاجَهَةِ التَّغَيُّرِ الْمُنَاخِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Svi se nadaju da će ovaj rad pomoći u suočavanju s klimatskim promjenama.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone hopes that this work will help in facing climate change.
